Investor Pitch Deck — Series B: The company is raising a $25 million Series B round to accelerate product development, double the sales team, and fund international expansion into Europe. Current ARR is $8.2 million, growing at 18% month-over-month, with a net revenue retention rate of 124% demonstrating strong expansion revenue from existing customers. The total addressable market for AI-powered document intelligence is estimated at $14 billion by 2027, and the company holds a differentiated position through its proprietary fine-tuned models and deep integrations with enterprise workflows. The round is led by Sequoia Capital with participation from existing investors Andreessen Horowitz and First Round Capital.
